subcodes.first_line: O Thou Who art possessed of glory and grandeur, before Whom all else tremble in awe! O my God! Thou beholdest my station in the midst of this mountain, and bearest witness to my heart that I desire naught but Thy love and the love of them that love Thee [3.5s]... ...Thou seest, O my Lord, my dwelling-place in the heart of this mountain and Thou dost witness my forbearance
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من له العزة و العظمة و ما سواه من خشیته یشفقون یا الهی انت تری موقفی فی وسط الجبل هذا و تشهد علی ضمیری بانی ما اردت الا حبک وحب من یحبک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
